testcase.name: test_04_check_advance_balance

failure.message: AssertionError: Advance should be Rs.100, got 0.0 assert 0.0 == 100

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hemali_payments.py:212: in test_04_check_advance_balance assert data["advance"] == 100, f"Advance should be Rs.100, got {data['advance']}" E AssertionError: Advance should be Rs.100, got 0.0 E assert 0.0 == 100

testcase.name: test_05_create_payment_auto_deducts_advance

failure.message: AssertionError: Advance before should be 100 assert 0.0 == 100

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hemali_payments.py:231: in test_05_create_payment_auto_deducts_advance assert data["advance_before"] == 100, f"Advance before should be 100" E AssertionError: Advance before should be 100 E assert 0.0 == 100

testcase.name: test_07_get_sardar_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Test sardar not found in list: ['Ramesh', 'TEST_Sardar_5kuz30ul', 'TEST_Sardar_66pfr1k6', 'TEST_Sardar_xmc5b89y'] assert 'TEST_Sardar_dh5mj8zq' in ['Ramesh', 'TEST_Sardar_5kuz30ul', 'TEST_Sardar_66pfr1k6', 'TEST_Sardar_xmc5b89y'] + where 'TEST_Sardar_dh5mj8zq' = pytest.test_sardar

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hemali_payments.py:254: in test_07_get_sardar_list assert pytest.test_sardar in data, f"Test sardar not found in list: {data}" E AssertionError: Test sardar not found in list: ['Ramesh', 'TEST_Sardar_5kuz30ul', 'TEST_Sardar_66pfr1k6', 'TEST_Sardar_xmc5b89y'] E assert 'TEST_Sardar_dh5mj8zq' in ['Ramesh', 'TEST_Sardar_5kuz30ul', 'TEST_Sardar_66pfr1k6', 'TEST_Sardar_xmc5b89y'] E + where 'TEST_Sardar_dh5mj8zq' = pytest.test_sardar

testcase.name: test_08_get_payments_filtered

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 3 payments for test sardar assert 0 >= 3 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hemali_payments.py:262: in test_08_get_payments_filtered assert len(data) >= 3, f"Should have at least 3 payments for test sardar" E AssertionError: Should have at least 3 payments for test sardar E assert 0 >= 3 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_09_undo_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hemali_payments.py:269: in test_09_undo_payment response = requests.put(f"{BASE_URL}/api/hemali/payments/{pytest.payment3_id}/undo") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'payment3_id'

testcase.name: test_10_undo_already_undone_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hemali_payments.py:283: in test_10_undo_already_undone_fails response = requests.put(f"{BASE_URL}/api/hemali/payments/{pytest.payment3_id}/undo") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'pytest' has no attribute 'payment3_id'
